boot.loadingDescription: Preparing your workspace and recent content.

shell.branchOverview: Every branch keeps its original path, so you can continue, archive, or compare without overwriting history.
shell.compareOverview: Compare mode places shared context and diverged content side by side so route validation stays readable.

branch.compareUnavailable: No other active branch is available for comparison
branch.healthDescription: There are {{activeCount}} active branches with {{siblingCount}} siblings at the same fork point. Consider comparing or archiving before continuing.
branch.healthActionHint: Compare the mainline or a nearby branch first, then archive low-value routes from the right panel.

conversation.welcomeSubtitle: Create a new conversation to start exploring with AI.
conversation.sidebarHint: Manage conversations here, then connect AI services from Settings whenever you're ready.
conversation.confirmArchive: Archive this conversation? It will disappear from the active list.
conversation.confirmDelete: Delete this conversation permanently? Its branches and messages will also be removed.

workspace.historyForkEmphasis: A new branch will be created on send. The original path remains unchanged.
workspace.editForkEmphasis: A new branch will be created on save. The original path remains unchanged.
workspace.downstreamSafe: They won't be overwritten or deleted.
workspace.readySubtitle: Conversations, branches, and history stay local. Add or switch AI services from Settings whenever you need them.
workspace.noProviderTitle: Start organizing now, connect a model later.
workspace.noProviderSubtitle: You can create conversations and structure your work before configuring any provider. When you're ready, add an AI service from Settings and start sending messages.
workspace.localFirstBody: Conversation structure and history stay on this device so you can pick up where you left off.
workspace.providerShortcutBody: Connecting an AI service is no longer required up front. Add it from Settings when you're ready.
workspace.cleanLayoutBody: Side panels switch to drawers on tighter viewports so the reading area stays clear.
workspace.editInlineDesc: New AI response will replace the previous one

compare.noDivergedMessages: No diverged messages on this path
compare.noSharedContext: No shared context (branches may start from different points)
compare.sharedContextHint: These messages are identical on both paths. Expand them to quickly review the pre-fork context.

message.generationRetryHint: Resend the previous user message to generate a new candidate answer.

composer.label: Compose
composer.providerRequiredHint: Enable an AI service in Settings to send messages.
composer.modelRequiredHint: Choose a default model in Settings to send messages.
composer.shortcutHint: Press Enter to send. Use Shift + Enter for a new line.
composer.branchModeHint: New branch: original path stays unchanged.

onboarding.title: Connect a working model provider before entering the workspace.
onboarding.subtitle: No provider is configured yet. The startup flow, default model recovery, and workspace restoration all depend on this configuration being real.
onboarding.noteBody: The backend connection-test code now contains a real HTTP probe, but this environment has not completed Rust compilation and Tauri smoke validation yet. The entry stays disabled so the UI does not advertise an unverified acceptance path.
onboarding.formSubtitle: This form only asks for the minimum required fields. After saving, the app opens a usable conversation automatically.
onboarding.apiKeyOptional: Usually not required for local models
onboarding.connectionNotice: The backend probe code now exists, but the button remains disabled until Rust compilation and smoke validation are complete. This step still focuses on bootstrap, settings persistence, and workspace restoration stability.
onboarding.footerHint: Saving also refreshes provider settings and the default model selection.

settings.title: Provider settings
settings.subtitle: Manage AI services, the default model, and connection status from one place.
settings.defaultModelHelp: Leave this empty to prefer each provider's own default model.
settings.providerFormHelp: Use this form to adjust connection details, default models, and enabled state after saving.
settings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the existing key
settings.modelsHelp: A provider can hold multiple model profiles. The request name is sent to the real API, while the display name is used in the UI.
settings.noModels: This provider has no model profile yet. Add at least one model before saving.
settings.modelsRequired: At least one model profile is required.
settings.modelFieldsRequired: Every model profile must include both a request name and a display name.
settings.modelRoutingHelp: The system ID is generated by the app for stable references. The request name is the real model name sent to the provider.
settings.connectionHelp: Connection test validates the currently saved provider configuration.
settings.saveBeforeTesting: Save the current changes before testing the connection.
settings.connectionSuccess: Connection succeeded. This AI service is ready to use.
settings.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Check the URL, key, or model service status.
settings.adviceModels: Keep commonly used models under the same provider when possible so branch-level model switching stays easy to reason about.
settings.adviceDefaultModel: The application default model is only a fallback. Individual branches can still override it without locking the whole workspace to one model.
settings.adviceConnection: Save the provider first, then test the connection. That makes it clear whether the problem is the draft itself or the backend connectivity.
settings.confirmDeleteProvider: Delete this provider? This also removes the stored API key reference.
settings.defaultModelSaveFailed: Failed to save the default model
settings.languageHelp: Switch the interface language. Changes take effect immediately.
settings.settings.aboutDescription: A local-first AI exploration workbench with branching conversations, multi-model management and auto-updates.

globalView.title: Global View
globalView.hint: Drag to pan · Scroll to zoom · Double-click to navigate

updater.unsupported: Updater is only available in desktop app
updater.installingHint: The app will restart automatically after download
updater.installFailed: Update failed. Please try again later.
